description: An MCP server for Roblox that provides tools to execute Luau code, inspect and modify game instances, teleport players, fire remote events, and stream client logs in real-time via a web dashboard.

name: feishu-markdown-mcp
description: Converts Markdown to Feishu/Lark document format and provides an MCP service for integration with the Model Context Protocol.

name: Next AI Draw.io MCP Server
description: Enables AI agents to generate and edit draw.io diagrams with real-time browser preview.

name: welcome-text-generator
description: Generates professional, modular welcome texts for new employees by extracting structured data from free-text input and assembling customizable templates.

name: test-coverage-mcp
description: MCP server that provides instant, token-efficient test coverage data for any programming language, allowing agents to query coverage summaries and track session progress.

name: io.github.gjeltep/app-store-connect-mcp
description: Enables management of App Store Connect resources including app reviews, TestFlight crashes, analytics reports, and Xcode Cloud workflows through natural language or AI agents.

name: Haiku RAG
description: Agentic RAG server for document management, hybrid search, question answering with citations, and analytical code execution, powered by LanceDB and Pydantic AI.

name: BNCC MCP Server
description: Enables AI assistants to query and validate BNCC (Brazilian curriculum) skills deterministically, preventing hallucinations by providing official data, search, and code validation tools.

name: expo-android
description: MCP server for Android emulator automation via ADB.

name: coolify-mcp
description: MCP server for Coolify API that enables full deployment workflows from zero to production, including project, server, and application management.

name: Email MCP Server
description: Universal email integration for AI assistants, supporting any IMAP provider with 18 tools for reading, sending, managing, and automating emails.

name: GenCodeDoc
description: Smart documentation generator and intelligent versioning system with full MCP support, enabling AI assistants like Claude and Gemini to manage project snapshots, generate docs, and control versioning via 26 MCP tools.

name: coverctl
description: Agent-loop coverage governance that provides coverage feedback to AI coding agents before commit, preventing regressions from reaching CI.

name: zenodo-mcp
description: An MCP server for discovering, retrieving, citing, and evaluating scientific records from the Zenodo repository.

name: spotdraft-mcp
description: MCP server that gives Claude safety-gated access to SpotDraft contracts, enabling querying and managing contracts, templates, counterparties, obligations, and analytics through natural language.
